title: promptukit question bank schema (permissive)
description: Permissive JSON Schema documenting the shapes and common fields accepted by promptukit loaders and tools. This schema enumerates common keys (aliases) and preserves additional unknown fields.

anyOf.description: Top-level object with a 'sections' array (preferred shape).
Top-level object with 'questions' (flat list) and optional 'categories' list of names.
Category -> questions mapping: top-level keys are category names mapping to arrays of questions.
Flat top-level array of question objects.

question.description: Question object. Multiple aliases are accepted for historical compatibility. Additional unknown fields are permitted and preserved by the GUI and loaders.

difficulty.description: Optional difficulty tag used by some tools.

question_type.description: Canonical question type. Inferred from structure when absent.

choices.description: Answer choices for MultipleChoice questions (commonly 4 items).

answers.description: Ordered blank answers for FillInTheBlank questions.

pairs.description: Matching pairs: list of [left, right] two-element arrays.

answer.description: Correct answer. Type varies: int index (MultipleChoice), bool (TrueFalse), string (ShortAnswer/Code), or number (Calculation).

unit.description: Optional unit label for Calculation answers (e.g. 'm/s', 'kg').

answer_space.description: Controls blank answer space in exam PDFs for ShortAnswer and Calculation questions. Use 'small' (1 in), 'medium' (2 in, default), 'large' (4 in), or a positive number of inches.

has_stimulus.description: True when an external image or table accompanies this question.

stimulus_location.description: Filepath or URL pointing at the stimulus asset (image, table, etc.). Used when has_stimulus is true.

language.description: Programming language label for Code questions (e.g. 'python', 'javascript'). Used for display.

quip_correct.description: Optional short message shown when answer is correct.

quip_wrong.description: Optional short message shown when answer is wrong.

available.description: Optional flag to include/exclude a question in sampling modes.

shuffle_choices.description: Optional flag whether to shuffle the choices when presenting the question.

group_id.description: Optional id used to group multi-part questions.

weight.description: Optional numeric weight for sampling or scoring.

expression.description: Optional expression for numeric or computed answers.
